summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shivani Verma portfolio website iteration 2 updates. All new features working perfectly including updated email/LinkedIn links, new Media & Insights section, and all existing functionality maintained.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly (4/4 tests passed)
Contact form POST endpoint working with proper validation
Footer email link href correctly set to mailto:shiviee@gmail.com
Footer LinkedIn link href correctly set to https://www.linkedin.com/in/shivaniverma/
Contact section displays Email: shiviee@gmail.com with clickable mailto link
New Media & Insights section exists with correct data-testid='media-section'
3 press/speaking highlight cards rendered: Minerva Women's Leadership Forums, Manono Leadership Conference, Value-Based Leadership in Practice
3 article items rendered with visible titles in editorial layout
Header navigation includes 'Media' link that scrolls to #media section
Minerva BC external link (https://minervabc.ca/events/) works correctly in press cards
Contact form submission successful via POST /api/contact with success message display
All existing sections render correctly: Hero, Message, Background, Speaking, Mentoring, Quote, Contact, Footer
Mobile responsiveness: hamburger menu includes Media link and works correctly
Mobile layout: press cards stack vertically, all content accessible
Mobile contact form fully functional with correct email display
